specialties.name: General Physician
specialties.description: Comprehensive primary care including routine checkups, preventive care and common illness treatment.

specialties.name: Gynecologist
specialties.description: Women’s health care including pregnancy support, PCOS management and menstrual health guidance.

specialties.name: Dermatologist
specialties.description: Skin, hair and nail treatments including acne, allergies, infections and cosmetic consultations.

specialties.name: Pediatrician
specialties.description: Specialized healthcare for infants, children and adolescents including vaccination and growth monitoring.

specialties.name: Neurologist
specialties.description: Diagnosis and treatment of nervous system disorders including migraine, seizures and stroke-related care.

specialties.name: Gastroenterologist
specialties.description: Digestive system care including acidity, liver issues, IBS, gastric problems and stomach infections.

specialties.name: Cardiologist
specialties.description: Heart health services including BP management, ECG consultation, cholesterol control and cardiac screening.

specialties.name: Orthopedic
specialties.description: Bone and joint care including fractures, back pain, arthritis, sports injuries and mobility support.

specialties.name: ENT
specialties.description: Ear, nose and throat treatments including sinus issues, throat infections, hearing problems and allergies.

specialties.name: Ophthalmologist
specialties.description: Eye care including vision checkups, eye infections, dryness, cataract consultation and eye health guidance.

specialties.name: Urologist
specialties.description: Urinary tract and kidney-related care including UTIs, kidney stones and bladder health consultation.

specialties.name: Dentist
specialties.description: Dental care including tooth pain treatment, cleaning, cavity filling, braces consultation and oral hygiene.

specialties.name: Oncologist
specialties.description: Cancer care guidance including early screening support, treatment planning and specialist consultation.

specialties.name: Psychiatrist
specialties.description: Mental health support including stress management, anxiety, depression and behavioral therapy guidance.
